headline: Beans 2 days past peak — harvest before 100°F heat watch.
weather_notes: Do all outdoor work before 8 AM through Monday — Extreme Heat Watch active July 24–28 with 100–101°F daily highs closing every afternoon window.
Skip irrigation today — both zones ran yesterday July 23 and soil retains adequate moisture for the next 24 hours.
Run both zones early Saturday morning — 2 days at 100°F+ will push soil past the re-water threshold; don't delay to Sunday's 101°F.
Check potato bags for heat and moisture stress before 8 AM — container soil dries faster than raised beds at 100°F+, especially the new cutting started July 9.

surfaced_tasks.title: Tip new blackberry primocanes if 3–4 ft tall
surfaced_tasks.reason: 14 days overdue — tip before 8 AM today in the only open window before 100°F+ heat closes outdoor access through Monday.

suggested_tasks.title: Harvest c2/c3/c4 beans — 2 days past peak
suggested_tasks.description: Jade Bush (c3/c4) and Red Swan (c2) hit 57 days today — pick before 8 AM while the Extreme Heat Watch allows fieldwork, before pods go fibrous.

suggested_tasks.title: Check c1 GMS beans for shell-stage pods
suggested_tasks.description: Good Mother Stollard is at 82 days from planting and entering its harvest window — check for plump green shell beans early Saturday morning.
